name: Property Management Financials
description: Property management financial analytics including P&L overview, rent roll, expense tracking, and payment history for real estate portfolios.

page_briefs.overview: P&L dashboard with revenue and expense summary cards at top, income vs expense bar chart, and NOI trend line chart. Date range selector in the header for period filtering.
page_briefs.rent-roll: Full rent roll table with columns for unit, tenant name, monthly rent, payment status, last payment date, and balance. Summary row at the bottom with totals.
page_briefs.expenses: Expense list view with filter bar for category and date range. Table rows showing expense date, category badge, vendor, property, amount, and receipt attachment indicator.
page_briefs.payments: Payment history table showing date, tenant, property, amount, method badge, and status. Filterable by property and date range. Summary cards at top showing collected vs outstanding totals.
